description_long: This object is a modern, circular pendant sconce designed to be suspended from the ceiling by three thin, evenly spaced cables. The main feature is a large, hollow ring with a smooth, matte finish, likely housing an integrated LED light source around its inner circumference. The cables converge at a flat, round ceiling mount, which is minimalistic and matches the ring's color and finish. The ring itself is substantial in diameter but relatively thin in cross-section, giving it a sleek and airy appearance. The design is free of visible decorative elements, focusing on clean lines and geometric simplicity. The overall look is contemporary and would suit urban or commercial interiors.
description: A large, circular pendant sconce with a smooth, matte ring suspended by three thin cables from a matching ceiling mount. The design is sleek, modern, and minimalistic.
description_view_0: The sconce is seen from a slight angle, showing the circular ring and the three suspension cables converging at the ceiling mount.
description_view_1: This view is nearly head-on, emphasizing the symmetry of the ring and the even spacing of the cables.
description_view_2: The ring and cables are visible from a slightly different angle, with the ring's thickness and the clean lines of the design clearly shown.
description_view_3: Similar to the previous view, this angle highlights the uniformity of the ring and the minimalistic ceiling mount.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a minimalist, modern design with a clean circular ring and thin suspension cables, emphasizing geometric simplicity and contemporary style.
